title: Daniel Homan
text: Home * People * Daniel Homan Danien Homan [1] Daniel C. Homan , an American astrophysicist and associate professor at Denison University , Granville, Ohio . He received his Ph.D. in physics from Brandeis University in 1999. As avocational computer chess programmer Daniel Homan is author of the experimental Chess Engine Communication Protocol compatible chess engine EXchess [2] .
